_note: Expert enablement prerequisites. An expert persona (matched by persona_name — see xiaoguai-core::persona_seed) is only SELECTABLE once every `required` group is satisfied. A group is satisfied when ANY of its items is: an `mcp` item = a marketplace slug with a live mcp_servers row; a `package` item = a host binary resolvable via `command -v <probe>`. `optional` slugs are add-ons the operator installs later. Offline: packages come from the operator's own index (see offline_hint / XIAOGUAI_MARKETPLACE_OFFLINE_HINT).
offline_hint: 离线部署:包发布在本地共享盘/内网索引上。安装前设 `UV_INDEX_URL` / `PIP_INDEX_URL` 指向该地址(或把 wheel 放进本地目录用 `uv tool install --find-links <dir>`)。具体地址见运维手册。
offline_hint_en: Offline deploy: packages live on a local share / internal index. Point `UV_INDEX_URL` / `PIP_INDEX_URL` at it before installing (or `uv tool install --find-links <dir>` from a local wheel dir).

experts.name: VMware Ops Assistant
experts.summary: Day-to-day vCenter/ESXi operations: inventory, alarms, VM lifecycle.
experts.summary_zh: vCenter/ESXi 日常运维:资源清单、告警、虚机生命周期。

required.label: Policy & audit foundation (host package)
required.label_zh: 策略与审计基座(主机包,必装)

required.label: At least one capability server (read-only monitor OR operations)
required.label_zh: 至少一个能力服务器(只读监控 或 运维)

experts.name: VMware Network Ops Assistant
experts.summary: NSX / NSX-Security / AVI network operations and policy.
experts.summary_zh: NSX / NSX 安全 / AVI 的网络运维与策略。

required.label: Policy & audit foundation (host package)
required.label_zh: 策略与审计基座(主机包,必装)

required.label: At least one network server (NSX OR NSX-Security)
required.label_zh: 至少一个网络服务器(NSX 或 NSX 安全)

experts.name: Data Analyst Assistant
experts.summary: Query and analyze data over a connected SQL database.
experts.summary_zh: 连上 SQL 数据库,查询与分析数据。

required.label: At least one SQL data source (Postgres OR SQLite)
required.label_zh: 至少一个 SQL 数据源(Postgres 或 SQLite)
